# Rod Happi

> Blog personal de Rodrigo Alegre — AI, tecnología y América Latina.

## About

This is a personal blog written in Spanish by Rodrigo Alegre, covering artificial intelligence, technology, and product development with a Latin American perspective. The site is a static blog built with vanilla HTML/CSS/JS.

## Site Structure

- Homepage: https://www.rodhappi.com/
- Posts: https://www.rodhappi.com/posts/{slug}.html
- RSS Feed: https://www.rodhappi.com/feed.xml
- Sitemap: https://www.rodhappi.com/sitemap.xml

## Topics

- Artificial Intelligence and its adoption in Latin America
- Product management and development
- Technology tools and workflows
- Building in public

## Author

Rodrigo Alegre — Life as Code | Building Systems that do the Job
